name: 7'10"x10' Plaid Outdoor Rug Gray - Threshold™
description:
Spread a cozy and casual foundation for your indoor or outdoor seating with the Gray Plaid Outdoor Rug from Threshold™. Designed with a construction that's suitable for use indoors or out, this rectangular rug adds a timeless pattern to your decor that will tie together your seating while adding a little texture and style. The decorative rug is adorned with white plaid over a light gray background to provide versatile appeal for multiple decorating styles and spaces.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
